Sender: T. Bould, Inspector, Inspectorate of Upper Egypt
Recipient: Monsieur E. Baraize, Directeur de Travaux
Brief_Summary: T. Bould relays the Director General's request to Monsieur Baraize for the prompt repair of Tomb N° 23 and asks him to investigate and discuss the matter.
English_Translation:
SERVICE OF ANTIQUITIES
INSPECTORATE OF UPPER EGYPT.
Luxor 29-12-1924
N° 5
Enclosures 1

Dear Monsieur Baraze,
The enclosed letter of Mr Davies was handed to me by The Dir. Gen. while I was in Cairo. He likes that the tomb N° 23 should be repaired as early as possible. Will you be so kind as to look into this matter & discuss it. Believe me, Dear Mon. Baraze, Yours Very Sincerely, T. Bould
Full_Transcription:
[Handwritten Arabic: تقديمه]

(FORM No. 1556, F.C.)

[Pencil note: ice]
SPECTORAT DE LA HAUTE EGYPTE.
Luxor 29-12-924
[Pencil note: a]
N° 5
Pièces jointes 1

Cher Monsieur Baraze
The enclosed letter of Mr Davies was
handed to me by The Dir. Gen. while I was in
Cairo. He likes that the tomb N° 23 should be
repaired as early as possible.
Will you be so kind as to look into
this matter & discuss it.
Believe me
Cher Mon. Baraze
Yours Very Sincerely
T. Bould
